item.title: When he doesn’t get the treat within a certain time he’ll usually try the next closest trick almost like he’s thinking he miss heard (spin is close to sit) But once he realizes he didn’t miss hear he does pretty good! #sillycat #cat #catsoftiktok
item.description: By @arno.theorangecat: When he doesn’t get the treat within a certain time he’ll usually try the next closest trick almost like he’s thinking he miss heard (spin is close to sit) But once he realizes he didn’t miss hear he does pretty good! #sillycat #cat #catsoftiktok
